hooks.command: cerebro recall --prime --format md -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Cerebro: no brain initialized for this project. Run: cerebro init -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"'; if [ -s "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.cerebro-gc.log" ]; then echo ''; echo '--- CEREBRO GC EVICTIONS (review and re-add if needed) ---'; tail -1 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.cerebro-gc.log"; fi

cerebro recall --prime --format md -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -s "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.cerebro-gc.log" ]; then echo ''; echo '--- CEREBRO GC EVICTIONS (review and re-add if needed) ---'; tail -1 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.cerebro-gc.log"; fi

cerebro recall --prime --format md -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -s "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.cerebro-gc.log" ]; then echo ''; echo '--- CEREBRO GC EVICTIONS (review and re-add if needed) ---'; tail -1 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.cerebro-gc.log"; fi

INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"session_id":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ -z "$SID" ]; then SID=default; fi; S="/tmp/cerebro-primed-$SID"; [ -f "$S" ] && exit 0; touch "$S"; cerebro recall --prime --format md -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true

INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"session_id":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); rm -f "/tmp/cerebro-primed-$SID"; echo "$(date -Iseconds) compaction completed" >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.cerebro-compact.log" 2>/dev/null; true
